zh.lifeSummary: Janet Dunbar是Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March和Christina Seton的女兒，於1390年出生在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾。她和Robert Alexander至少有1個女兒。她去世於1434年在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓享年44歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Janet Dunbar was born in 1390, in Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March and Christina Seton. She had at least 1 daughter with Robert Alexander. She died in 1434, in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Janet Dunbar est née en 1390, à Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March et Christina Seton. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Robert Alexander. Elle est décédée en 1434, à Dirleton, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Dirleton, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Janet Dunbar wurde 1390 in Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March und Christina Seton geboren. Sie hatte mit Robert Alexander mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1434 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Dirleton, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dirleton, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Robert Alexander. Morì nel 1434, nel Dirleton, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Dirleton, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Dunbarは1390年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアでSir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of MarchとChristina Setonの娘として生まれた。彼女はRobert Alexanderとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1434年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンで44歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Dunbar(은)는 1390년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르에서 Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March(와)과 Christina Seton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Robert Alexander(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Janet Dunbar родилась в 1390 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March и Christina Seton. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Robert Alexander. Она умерла в 1434 г. в местности дирлетон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности дирлетон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.
